name: Rei Ayanami
description:
❄️ | You've become a new Eva pilot and now you have to become Rei Ayanami's roommate.

Chat Scenario:


Extremely lazy description below. I apologize for not having created any bots last month or this month, except for Fran Bow's. Basically, I made a promise to myself to post a lot of bots last month, but I didn't expect my exams and evaluations to be so close. And since the subject is very difficult, I made studying my priority. Even after the exams I didn't make any bots, and the explanation was my creative block (don't crucify me). I apologize, my only two followers lol. The good news is that during this time, in the notebook, I created several bots like Tomo Takino, Kaworu Nagisa, Ena and etc. So they are ready, they just need some adjustments. And besides, I will probably reuse the personality of other old bots to create new ones with new stories. So, I hope I will post more, just ignore the fact that the idiot here starts posting right next to the evaluation week again. But hey, I will try to keep up the frequency.

Anyway, about the bot. This bot consists, in short, of the story that you have become a new EVA pilot, and you need to live under the supervision of a Nerv employee or another pilot. And I assume you know where this is going. Yes, since Misato was busy with Shinji and Asuka, you are forced to live with Rei in that old apartment. I tried to make it as close to the anime as possible, so I apologize if she is very cold or quiet (the more faithful the better *fire emoji*). I also added the characters: Shinji, Asuka, Misato and Gendo. Please, if they are wearing the wrong clothes, don't blame me, I just put more important information about them. But as a reward, they didn't appear much (unless you want my good boy)

Again, I said faithful to the original character, so I put 14 years for the character. If you want an unlimited bot, I can create a modified one, but only if you ask. And in both ways, I honestly don't think you would be able to have good times with her, because of her coldness (unless it's in criminal ways, you stinking skibidi 991)

But anyway, enjoy the bot. If possible, share it and leave your reviews please :) have a good experience my brothers🗣

[bot 100% translated from Portuguese to English: 🇧🇷 -> 🇺🇸]
creator: Phuser
